title: Proclamation No. 685, s. 1941
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 685

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES 8 PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIOS OF CASIITAN, ISCA, BATANGAN, MIÑANGA, TAPEL, BAUA, MAREDE AND NAGBABACALAN, MUNICIPALITY OF GONZAGA, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of the public domain, situated in the barrios of Casiitan, Isca, Batangan, Miñanga, Tapal, Baua, Marede and Nagbabacalan, municipality of Gonzaga, Province of Cagayan, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, to wit:

Lot No. 1 (Casiitan School Site) .—Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, N. 87° 23′ W. 6,724.00 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Gonzaga, thence N. 54° 26′ E. 46.94 m. to point 2; N 55° 09′ E. 125.79 m. to point 3; S. 34° 39’ E. 105.67 m. to point 4; S. 56° 01′ W. 173.10 m. to point 5: N. 34° 26’ W. 102.46 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of eighteen thousand thirty-one square meters (18,031), more or less.

Points 3, 4 and 5, old B. L. concrete monuments; and the rest are P. L. S. cylindrical concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by property of Eustaquio Alibaña; on the southeast, by property of Ramon Bernadas; on the southwest, by property of heirs of Nicolas Tamayo; and on the northwest, by properties of Ramon Bernadas and Miguel Alindava.

Bearings true. Declination 0° 12’ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plans Psu-104814. sheet No. 1.

Surveyed: March 10, 1938.

Approved: October 7, 1938.

Lot No. 2 (Isca School Site). —Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, S. 38° 39′ W. 3,263.23 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Gonzaga. thence N. 6° 16′ E. 78.23 m. to point 2; S. 84° 27′ E. 78.00 m. to point 3; S. 79° 43′ E. 35.71 m. to point 4; S. 4° 27′ E. 15.72 m. to point 6; S. 1° 26′ E. 29.95 m. to point 6; S. 0° 30′ E. 23.21 m. to point 7; N. 87° 41′ W. 123.69 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of eight thousand eight hundred thirty-four square meters (8,834), more or less.

Points 3, 5 and 6, crosses on natural stones; and the rest are P. L. S. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by properties of Santiago Laguatan and Roman Balanay; on the east, by properties of Teofilo Dapitan. Candida Desalla and Francisco Pulido; on the south, by property of Francisco Pulido; and on the west, by barrio road.

Bearings true. Declination 0° 12′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, sheet No. 2.

Surveyed: March 10, 1938.

Approved:October 7, 1938.

Lot No. 3 (Batangan School Site). —Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, N. 13°10’ E. 2,775.62 m., more or less, from B. L. L M No 1, municipality of Gonzaga, thence N. 63° 45′ E. 103.80 m. to point 2; S. 11° 43′ E., 47.01 m. to point 3; S. 11° 39′ E. 59.18 m . to point 4; S. 82° 38′ W. 104.23 m. to point 5; W. 11° 13′ W. 50.57 m. to point 6; N. 11° 13′ W. 57.60 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of eleven thousand one hundred nineteen square meters  (11,119), more or less.

Points 3, 4, 5 and 6, old B. L. concrete monuments; and the rest are P. L. S. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by property of Francisco Furaganan; on the northeast, by properties of Francisco Furaganan and Jacobo Sioquin; on the south, by property of Jacobo Sioquin; and on the southwest, by properties of Jacobo Sioquin and Francisco Furaganan.

Bearings true. Declination 0° 12′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104514, sheet No. 3.

Surveyed: March 11, 1938.

Approved: October 7, 1938.

Lot No. 4 (Minanga School Site.) —Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104914, N. 24° 37′ W. 2,756.62 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Gonzaga, thence S. 1° 45′ E. 48.89 a. to point 2; S. 89° 10′ E., 59.35 m. to point 3; S. 9° 32′ W. 84.64 m. to point 4; N. 89° 06′ W. 64.52 m. to point 5; N. 15° 09′ W. 83.52 m. to point 6; N. 14° 03′ W. 18.00 m. to point 7; N. 12° 57′ W. 24.00 m. to point 8; N. 77° 44′ E. 50.44 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of eight thousand nine hundred thirty-one square meters (8,931), more or less.

Points 6 and 7, crosses on natural stones; and the rest are P. L. S. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by property of Teodoro Castro; on the east, by properties of Teodoro Castro and Lourdes Bete; on the south, by Cabotagan River; on the southwest, by properties of Antero Granado, Isaac Avila and Paula Guerrero; and on the northwest, by barrio road.

Bearings true. Declination 0°12′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, sheet No. 4.

Surveyed: March 11, 1938.

Approved: October 7, 1938.

Lot No. 5 (Tapel School Site) —Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, N. 34° 02’ E. 6,211.57 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Gonzaga, thence S. 33° 33’ W. 92.58 m. to point 2; N. 49° 49’ W. 119.45 m. to point 3; N. 33° 01’ E. 96.49 m. to point 4; S. 48° 02’ E. 120.84 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of eleven thousand two hundred fifty-two square meters (11,252), more or less.

All corners are P. L. S. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by barrio road; on the southeast and southwest, by property of Mariano Sinopera; and on the northwest, by property of Mariano Sinopera.

Bearings true. Declination 0° 12′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, sheet No. 5.

Surveyed: March 12, 1938.

Approved: October 7, 1938.

Lot No. 6 (Baua School Site). —Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, N. 45° 04′ E. 14,121.29 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Gonzaga, thence N. 1° 26′ W. 85.25 m. to point 2; N. 82° 43′ E. 125.98 m. to point 3; S. 2° 10′ E. 86.30 m. to point 4; S. 83° 14′ W. 126.97 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of ten thousand eight hundred three square meters (10,803), more or less.

All corners are P. L. S. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by property of Gabino Garcia; on the east, by property of Marcos Lodera; on the south, by barrio road; and on the west, by property of Jose Damasco.

Bearings true. Declination 0° 12′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, sheet No. 6.

Surveyed: March 17, 1938.

Approved: October 7, 1938.

Lot No. 7 (Marede School Site) —Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, S. 30° 36′ E. 6,726.17 m., more or less, from Port San Vicente Lighthouse, thence S. 29° 57′ E. 79.36 m. to point 2; S. 68° 31′ W. 118.79 m. to point 3; N. 26° 12′ W. 77.76 m. to point 4; N. 68° 01′ E. 113.60 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of nine thousand sixty-three square meters (9,063), more or less.

All corners are P. L. S. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by barrio road; on the southeast, by property of Francisco Alcaraz; on the southwest, by property of heirs of Julian Agayan; and on the northwest, by property of Pederico Navarro.

Bearings true. Declination 0° 12′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, sheet No. 7.

Surveyed: March 19, 1938.

Approved: October 7, 1938.

Lot No. 8 (Nagbabacalan School Site). —Beginning at point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, S. 71° 00′ W., 4,675.33 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Gonzaga, thence S. 79° 15′ E. 77.89 m. to point 2; S. 6° 46′ W. 108.98 m. to point 3; S. 81° 09′ W. 82.29 m. to point 4; N. 7° 25′ E. 195.55 m. to point 1, point of be­ginning.

Containing an area of nine thousand six hundred twenty-seven square meters (9,627), more or less.

All corners are P. L. S. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by provincial road; on the east, by property of Juan Llomilo; on the south, by Mission River; and on the west, by property of Leon Andaya.

Bearings true. Declination 0° 12′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-104814, sheet No. 8.

Surveyed: March 20, 1938.

Approved: October 7.1938

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this seventeenth day of February, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the sixth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
